content:
If They Act
Their power resets to zero, and they take an XP hit.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures long-term mystery—students don’t know what the Observer is doing.
✔ Creates a slow-building tension—when will things start shifting?
✔ Introduces real consequences for breaking neutrality.

📜 5. Final Refinement of the Faustian Bargain

📜 Now the Bargain must be “unlocked” through specific class events.

✔ A student cannot just receive the Bargain—it must be earned through specific conditions.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 391 (chunk 391/555)
